ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., Urban, Rural, International) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the classification (e.g., Age, Sex, Economic) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the classification is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the classification data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classif1" (
  "classif1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classif1 */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification the classif1 belongs to */,
  "classif1_name" TEXT /* Name of the classif1 */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classif1 */,
  "parent_classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent classification */,
  "is_aggregate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the classif1 is an aggregate metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the classif1 data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classif1_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classif2" (
  "classif2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classif2 */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification the classif2 belongs to */,
  "classif2_name" TEXT /* Name of the classif2 */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classif2 */,
  "parent_classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent classification */,
  "is_aggregate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the classif2 is an aggregate metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the classif2 data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classif2_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sex classification is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sex data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-series data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "classif1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classif1 the data belongs to */,
  "classif2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classif2 the data belongs to */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex the data belongs to */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time period the data represents */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Census, Survey) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., Population, Employment) */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is estimated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the time-series data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_classif2_id FOREIGN KEY ("classif2_id") REFERENCES classif2 ("classif2_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_classif1_id FOREIGN KEY ("classif1_id") REFERENCES classif1 ("classif1_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the permission belongs to */,
  "classif1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classif1 the permission belongs to */,
  "classif2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classif2 the permission belongs to */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is a default one */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the permission data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_classif1_id FOREIGN KEY ("classif1_id") REFERENCES classif1 ("classif1_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_classif2_id FOREIGN KEY ("classif2_id") REFERENCES classif2 ("classif2_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has admin privileges */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is a default one */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role permission data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the primary role for the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user role data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
